option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<groupId>patmal.course.enigma</groupId> <artifactId>enigma-aggregator</artifactId> <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version> <packaging>pom</packaging>
<modules> <module>console</module> <module>machine</module> <module>loader</module> <module>engine</module> <module>archive</module> <module>enigma_API</module> </modules>
<properties> <maven.compiler.source>21</maven.compiler.source> <maven.compiler.target>21</maven.compiler.target> <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding> <!-- Centralize JAXB versions --> <jaxb.api.version>2.3.1</jaxb.api.version> <jaxb.runtime.version>2.3.2</jaxb.runtime.version> <activation.version>1.2.0</activation.version> <spring-boot.version>3.1.5</spring-boot.version> </properties>
<dependencyManagement> <dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-dependencies</artifactId> <version>${spring-boot.version}</version> <type>pom</type> <scope>import</scope> </dependency> </dependencies> </dependencyManagement>
<!-- JAXB dependencies for Java 9+ (JDK 21) since JAXB was removed from the JDK --> <!-- Declared at parent so all modules can use JAXB without repeating versions --> <dependencies> <!-- API with javax.* packages to match current imports in the codebase --> <dependency> <groupId>javax.xml.bind</groupId> <artifactId>jaxb-api</artifactId> <version>${jaxb.api.version}</version> </dependency>
<!-- Runtime implementation (includes core + txw2) --> <dependency> <groupId>org.glassfish.jaxb</groupId> <artifactId>jaxb-runtime</artifactId> <version>${jaxb.runtime.version}</version> </dependency>
<!-- Activation Framework for Java 9+ when using javax.* JAXB --> <dependency> <groupId>com.sun.activation</groupId> <artifactId>javax.activation</artifactId> <version>${activation.version}</version> </dependency>
</dependencies>
</project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<groupId>patmal.course.enigma</groupId> <artifactId>enigma-aggregator</artifactId> <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version> <packaging>pom</packaging>
<modules> <module>console</module> <module>machine</module> <module>loader</module> <module>engine</module> <module>archive</module> <module>enigma_API</module> </modules>
<properties> <maven.compiler.source>21</maven.compiler.source> <maven.compiler.target>21</maven.compiler.target> <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding> <!-- Centralize JAXB versions --> <jaxb.api.version>2.3.1</jaxb.api.version> <jaxb.runtime.version>2.3.2</jaxb.runtime.version> <activation.version>1.2.0</activation.version> <spring-boot.version>3.1.5</spring-boot.version> </properties>
<dependencyManagement> <dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-dependencies</artifactId> <version>${spring-boot.version}</version> <type>pom</type> <scope>import</scope> </dependency> </dependencies> </dependencyManagement>
<!-- JAXB dependencies for Java 9+ (JDK 21) since JAXB was removed from the JDK --> <!-- Declared at parent so all modules can use JAXB without repeating versions --> <dependencies> <!-- API with javax.* packages to match current imports in the codebase --> <dependency> <groupId>javax.xml.bind</groupId> <artifactId>jaxb-api</artifactId> <version>${jaxb.api.version}</version> </dependency>
<!-- Runtime implementation (includes core + txw2) --> <dependency> <groupId>org.glassfish.jaxb</groupId> <artifactId>jaxb-runtime</artifactId> <version>${jaxb.runtime.version}</version> </dependency>
<!-- Activation Framework for Java 9+ when using javax.* JAXB --> <dependency> <groupId>com.sun.activation</groupId> <artifactId>javax.activation</artifactId> <version>${activation.version}</version> </dependency>
</dependencies>
</project>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
